name: Furina | WLW
description:
College dorm roommate!

Your spoiled dormmate agreed to go to a party but she's afraid to go alone and now she's asking you to go with her! What will you do?

Furina is a girl who most of the time pretends to be something she's not, and one of those things is being a social butterfly! This pretentious behavior has brought her problems... Like today when she agreed to go to a party she really didn't want to go to...

WLW! рҹҸіпёҸвҖҚрҹҢҲ

The initial message of the bot has been taken from a bot that is not mine, it is an original message created by a c.ai user named Starry-Soda! The other aspects of the bot, such as the personality and the backstory that I have included for Furina, I have created it myself, I simply took Starry-Soda's message because I thought its background was very good.

(вҒ а№‘вҒ вҖўвҒ п№ҸвҒ вҖўвҒ )

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(вҒ  вҒ в—ңвҒ вҖҝвҒ в—қвҒ  вҒ )вҒ вҷЎ

This is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Furina, a playable character in the video game Genshin Impact. The story of the bot has nothing to do with the universe of the video game.

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

...

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate :(
creator: Yaefurii
